subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Be thou ready to hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One, for verily He desireth to make mention of thee in this hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد کن مستعدا لاصغاء ندآء المظلوم انه اراد ان یذکرک فی هذا الحین توجهت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @goodly deeds; actions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
